scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.types:cf: bun run --cwd apps/web types:cf && bun run --cwd apps/worker-edge-guard types:cf && bun run --cwd apps/worker-post-events types:cf && bun run --cwd apps/worker-og types:cf
scripts.types:cf:check: bun run --cwd apps/web types:cf:check && bun run --cwd apps/worker-edge-guard types:cf:check && bun run --cwd apps/worker-post-events types:cf:check && bun run --cwd apps/worker-og types:cf:check
scripts.check: bun run types:cf:check && bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bunx tsc -p packages/auth-hasher-contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/auth-hasher-client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/auth-hasher-better-auth-adapter/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/auth-hasher/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/auth-hasher-worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-content/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-meta/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-edge-guard/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-post-events/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/worker-og/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun run --cwd apps/web check
scripts.check:ci: bun run check && bun run verify:openapi
scripts.test:unit: bun run --cwd packages/api test && bun test packages/auth-hasher-contracts/test/index.test.ts packages/auth-hasher-client/test/index.test.ts packages/gateway/src/resolver.test.ts packages/shared/test/auth-bridge.test.ts packages/shared/test/og-template.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/server/auth-social.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/server/auth-password-hasher.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/server/auth-password-rehash.test.ts apps/web/src/lib/server/og-worker.test.ts apps/auth-hasher-worker/src/fetch-handler.test.ts apps/auth-hasher-worker/src/kernel-node.test.ts && bun run --cwd apps/worker-edge-guard test && bun run --cwd apps/worker-post-events test && bun run --cwd apps/worker-og test
scripts.gen:openapi: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun packages/api/scripts/gen-openapi.ts
scripts.verify:openapi: bun run gen:openapi && git diff --exit-code apps/web/static/openapi
